description: Where it all began — writing C gave me a deep appreciation for memory management, pointers, and how software truly talks to hardware.
I use C++ for performance-critical applications — OOP, STL, and low-level memory control make it my weapon of choice for systems programming.
A clean, powerful language I use for .NET applications and game logic — its strong typing and LINQ support make complex data tasks a breeze.
My Swiss Army knife — I use Python for everything from backend APIs and data pipelines to AI integrations and automation scripts.
Rust challenges me in the best way — its ownership model and zero-cost abstractions push me to write safer, faster systems-level code.
Go's simplicity and blazing concurrency model make it my top pick for building high-throughput microservices and CLI tools.
Battle-tested with Java for enterprise backends and Android — its robust ecosystem and strict OOP patterns sharpen my architectural thinking.
The language I breathe — from DOM manipulation to async wizardry, JavaScript powers virtually everything I build on the web.
TypeScript is JavaScript with superpowers — I rely on it daily for type-safe codebases that scale without becoming a maintenance nightmare.
Bash is my automation glue — I write shell scripts for deployment pipelines, server setup, file processing, and anything that should never be done manually twice.
